text: This is silly. I feel like the funniest part is you're laughing. You say knock, knock. Knock, knock. Who's there? Um, carrot. You say lock knock. Who's there? Carrot. Carrot, who? Knock, knock. Who's there? Och. Ouch. Say och who. Who? Bless you. Knock, knock. Who's there? Ouch. Ach who. Achoo. Bless you. You still filming? Because it hasn't reached a minute yet?
